description: Initial screen state: Askable Sessions landing page with a dark background and a message about screen sharing. A small video feed of the participant is in the top right.
frame_description: The screen shows the Askable Sessions interface with a dark background and a prompt to share the screen.

description: The first part of the task description is typed out on the screen: 'Perfect! Here's your task: Imagine you need to book a return domestic flight within Australia for an upcoming trip. Using the Flight Centre website, search for flights, select your preferred options, and proceed through the booking flow including reviewing any ancillaries and seat selection.'
frame_description: Text is appearing on the dark background of the Askable Sessions page.

description: The second part of the task description is typed out: 'Please think out loud as you go — share what you're looking at, what you're thinking, and any reactions you have. You can stop once you reach the page asking for traveller details (you don't need to enter any personal information or complete the actual purchase).'
frame_description: The second block of instruction text is being rendered on the screen.

description: An 'Open' button with an external link icon appears below the instruction text.
frame_description: A button labeled 'Open' is now visible at the bottom of the text area.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The 'Open' button is activated by a click.

description: Navigation to the Flight Centre website. The page loads through a black screen and skeleton states before fully rendering.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Book Flights, Hotels & Holidays
frame_description: The browser switches to a new tab and loads the Flight Centre homepage.

description: The hero banner carousel rotates from 'UK & EUROPE SALE' to 'QANTAS FLIGHTS SALE'.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Book Flights, Hotels & Holidays
frame_description: The large promotional banner on the homepage changes its content.

description: A 'Travel dates' modal overlay appears automatically on the screen.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Book Flights, Hotels & Holidays
frame_description: A calendar-based modal window is now visible in the center of the screen.

description: The 'Travel dates' modal appears over the homepage content.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: A 'Travel dates' modal is visible over the Flight Centre homepage.

description: A promotional overlay appears over the travel dates calendar.
frame_description: A promotional banner for World360 covers the calendar in the modal.

description: User hovers over the close button of the promotional overlay.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'x' icon on the promotional banner.

description: User clicks the close button on the promotional overlay.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'x' button to close the promo.

description: The promotional overlay is dismissed, revealing the calendar.
frame_description: The promotional banner is gone, and the calendar is visible again.

description: User clicks the 'One way' tab in the travel dates modal.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'One way' option in the modal.

description: The 'One way' tab is highlighted as active.
frame_description: The 'One way' tab is now highlighted in blue.

description: User clicks the 'Return' tab in the travel dates modal.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Return' option in the modal.

description: The 'Return' tab is highlighted as active.
frame_description: The 'Return' tab is now highlighted in blue.

description: User hovers over February 18th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the number 18 in the February calendar.

description: User selects February 18th in the date picker.
frame_description: The user clicks on the date 18.

description: The date February 18th is highlighted in the calendar.
frame_description: February 18th is now highlighted, indicating selection.

description: User hovers over February 21st in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor is over the number 21 in the February calendar.

description: User selects February 21st in the date picker.
frame_description: The user clicks on the date 21.

description: The date range February 18th to 21st is highlighted.
frame_description: The calendar shows the range from the 18th to the 21st highlighted.

description: User hovers over the 'Done' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Done' button at the bottom of the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Done' button.

description: The travel dates modal closes and the homepage search bar updates.
frame_description: The modal is gone, and the search bar now shows 'Wed, 18 Feb - Sat, 21 Feb'.

description: User hovers over the destination input field.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Where to?' field in the search bar.

description: User clicks the 'Where to?' input field.
frame_description: The user clicks the destination input field.

description: A destination suggestion dropdown appears.
frame_description: A list of popular destinations like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane appears below the input field.

description: User hovers over 'Melbourne, Australia' in the suggestion list.
frame_description: The cursor is over the Melbourne option in the dropdown.

description: User selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks on 'Melbourne, Australia'.

description: The destination dropdown closes and the selection is confirmed.
frame_description: The dropdown is gone and 'Melbourne, Australia' is in the destination field.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the blue 'Search flights' button.

description: The page navigates to the flight search results.
frame_description: The screen goes white as the browser loads the new URL.

description: The flight search results page is in a loading state with a spinner and promotional messaging.
frame_description: A red header with flight search parameters is visible above a white content area containing a loading spinner and the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'.

description: A loading screen appears on the search results page.
frame_description: The page shows a loading message: 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'

description: The search results for the departing flight from Sydney to Melbourne load and become visible.
frame_description: The page now displays a list of available flights with details like departure time, airline logo, and price buttons.

description: The cursor hovers over the price button for the 6:00 AM Qantas flight.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue button labeled 'From $307' in the first flight result row.

description: User clicks on the price button for the 6:00 AM Qantas flight to expand fare options.
frame_description: The price button is activated, triggering a layout change in the flight result row.

description: The flight result row expands to show 'Red eDeal' and 'Economy Flex' fare options.
frame_description: Two columns appear below the flight summary, detailing the features and prices of different fare classes.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the Red eDeal fare.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'SELECT' button within the Red eDeal fare column.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the Red eDeal fare.
frame_description: The 'SELECT' button is clicked, initiating the selection process.

description: The 'SELECT' button changes to a green checkmark, confirming the fare selection.
frame_description: The blue button is replaced by a green square with a white checkmark.

description: A 'Good choice!' overlay with a loading spinner appears as the page prepares to show return flight options.
frame_description: The screen is partially obscured by a white overlay with the text 'Good choice!' and a blue loading spinner.

description: The page navigates to the return flight selection screen.
frame_description: The address bar updates to show the new URL, and the page content refreshes to show return flights from Melbourne to Sydney.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'CHANGE' link for the departing flight.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue 'CHANGE' text in the summary section at the top right.

description: User clicks the 'CHANGE' link to return to the departing flight selection.
frame_description: The 'CHANGE' link is clicked, triggering a navigation back to the previous state.

description: The page navigates back to the departing flight selection screen.
frame_description: The URL in the address bar changes back, and the page content updates to show the list of departing flights from Sydney to Melbourne again.

description: User scrolls down the page to view more return flight options.
frame_description: The user is on the flight search results page for a return flight from Melbourne to Sydney.

description: User scrolls down through the departing flight search results.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls through the list of flights.

description: User hovers over the flight sorting dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Departure Time (Earliest)' sorting dropdown at the top right of the results list.

description: User clicks on the first flight option to view fare types.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'From $157' button on the first flight result (Virgin Australia).

description: The flight details expand to reveal 'Select Returning Fare Type' with Lite, Choice, and Flex options.
frame_description: The UI has expanded to show three fare columns: Lite, Choice, and Flex for the selected flight.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare option.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'SELECT' button at the bottom of the 'Lite' fare column.

description: An 'All Set!' overlay with a loading spinner appears while the next page is prepared.
frame_description: A full-screen white overlay with the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' and a blue loading spinner is visible.

description: The page navigates to the 'Review trip' summary page.
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is now visible, showing details for both the departing and returning flights.

description: The 'Price summary' sidebar appears on the right side of the page.
frame_description: A sidebar titled 'Price summary' has appeared on the right, showing the total cost of $514.78.

description: User scrolls down the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The user is viewing the flight summary and price details on the Flight Centre review page.

description: User continues scrolling down past the baggage add-ons.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the baggage selection area.

description: User scrolls down to the 'Seats' section.
frame_description: The user reaches the 'Seats' section at the bottom of the page.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT SEATS' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'SELECT SEATS' button.

description: A 'Select Seats' overlay appears with a 'Loading seat selector' message and spinner.
frame_description: A modal overlay appears over the page with a loading spinner.

description: User pauses to review the seat map for the first flight.
frame_description: The seat map for the Sydney to Melbourne flight is displayed.

description: User clicks on seat 5E in the seat map.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on seat 5E in the interactive seat map.

description: Seat 5E is highlighted to indicate it has been selected.
frame_description: Seat 5E changes color to green, indicating selection.

description: User pauses after selecting seat 5E.
frame_description: The user remains on the seat map with seat 5E selected.

description: A popup appears for seat 5E showing 'Preferred Seat $28.00 pp'.
frame_description: A small information box appears over the seat map for seat 5E.

description: User hovers over the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the popup.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the small popup.

description: User clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: The seat selection popup closes.
frame_description: The information box for seat 5E disappears.

description: Click on the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the seat selection modal.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: A seat selection modal is open over the flight results page, with seat 5E selected and the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button highlighted.

description: The seat selection modal closes and seat 5E is highlighted in green on the main page.
frame_description: The seat selection modal has closed, and the main page now shows seat 5E highlighted in green.

description: User hovers over the 'DONE' button.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the 'DONE' button at the bottom right of the overlay.

description: User clicks the 'DONE' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'DONE' button.

description: A loading spinner appears briefly, then the seat selector overlay closes.
frame_description: The seat selection overlay disappears, returning the user to the main review page.

description: Click on the 'NEXT FLIGHT' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user clicks the 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right of the page.

description: A loading message 'Loading seat selector' appears on the screen.
frame_description: A 'Loading seat selector' message is displayed in the center of the page.

description: The seat selection grid is replaced by a summary of the selected flights and seats.
frame_description: The page now displays a summary of the selected flights and seats instead of the seat selection grid.

description: User scrolls down the flight summary page.
frame_description: The user is scrolling down the page, revealing more details of the flight summary and the 'CONTINUE' button.

description: Click on the 'CONTINUE' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user clicks the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the summary page.

description: A loading overlay with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' appears.
frame_description: A loading overlay is visible with a spinner and the text 'Thanks for confirming your flights'.

description: Navigation to the traveller details page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The URL has changed to /passenger and the 'Travellers' page header is now visible.

description: The traveller details form fields load and appear on the page.
frame_description: The form fields for traveller details, such as Title, First name, and Last name, are now visible.

description: Click on the 'This traveller is the booking contact' checkbox.
interaction_target: This traveller is the booking contact

frame_description: The user clicks the checkbox labeled 'This traveller is the booking contact'.

description: The 'This traveller is the booking contact' checkbox is checked.

description: User scrolls down the traveller details form.
frame_description: The user is scrolling down the page to access more fields in the traveller information form.
